stemHtml: The Contingency procedure for aircraft experiencing equipment failure in the NAT HLA is…

options.a:
Turn left or right by 30° from the cleared route or track.
Establish a 5 NM offset from the Centre line of the track or route,
Parallel track
Consider descending or climbing 500 ft from the cleared level if below FL410.
options.b:
Turn right 45° from the cleared track or route
Descend 500 ft
Establish a 10 NM offset.
options.c:
Turn left or right by 30° from the cleared route or track.
Establish a 5 NM offset from the Centre line of the track or route,
Parallel track
Consider descending or climbing 300 ft from the cleared level if below FL410.
options.d: Stay on track and descend below FL285 to clear the NAT HLA.
